title: calendula sinuata var. aurantiaca
intro: Calendula sinuata var. aurantiaca, also known as the orange marigold, is a variety of the calendula flower that belongs to the daisy family and is characterized by its vibrant orange petals and strong, pungent scent. The medicinal properties of Calendula sinuata var. aurantiaca lie in its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include wound healing, skin protection, and the treatment of minor cuts and scrapes, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote menstrual health. Calendula sinuata var. aurantiaca can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, salves, and creams, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
